title: Ryuubatsu no Fiera
synopsis: The Kingdom of Swordland was reduced to ashes in a single night by a dragon that appeared out of nowhere. Princess Fiera, who lost her homeland and family before her very eyes, rises up to slay her sworn enemy, the calamity known as the "dragon," while bearing her brother's will and the unvoiced grief of the people on her still young shoulders!

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

title: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleRomaji: Koishita Hito wa, Imouto no Kawari ni Shindekure to Itta.: Imouto to Kekkon Shita Kataomoi Aite ga Naze Imasara Watashi no Moto ni? to Omottara @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleNative: 恋した人は、妹の代わりに死んでくれと言った。―妹と結婚した片思い相手がなぜ今さら私のもとに？と思ったら―@COMIC
synopsis: Wisteria, the daughter of a count, secretly has feelings for Bright, a beautiful childhood friend and son of a duke who, unable to use magic, had been conducting forbidden research in the shadows. Devastated when Bright confesses his love for her younger sister, Wisteria is even more hurt when he asks her to take her sister's place as a sacrifice. Is her love for Bright so strong that she will give up her life for him? (Source: TOKYOPOP)

title: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleNative: 追放令嬢、クラフトしながらキャンピングカーで異世界を旅します
synonyms: The Exiled Lady Travels to Another World in a Camper Van While Crafting
synopsis: Riding in a camper, eating delicious food, and enjoying the spectacular view. Saori Furuki was a university student in the engineering department and loved making things. After a car accident, she is reborn as Eline, the daughter of a viscount, However, her family treats her coldly, saying that she is incompetent and can only use magic to produce items, and she is exiled from the country. However, Eline's “alchemy magic” is a magic that has unlimited possibilities when combined with the knowledge from her previous life! Determined to live freely from now on, Eline has created a camper for starters. She can move around, live, and make things as she pleases. Together with Aristy, a martial maid who adores Eline, she begins her adventurous journey with a sense of ease. Eating delicious food, admiring the spectacular scenery, and creating useful things. This is a travel story about riding in a camper and enjoying another world with elegance. (Source: SB Creative, translated)

title: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 3 Let's spread books through the duchy!
titleRomaji: Honzuki no Gekokujou: Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen Dai 3-bu - Ryouchi ni Hon wo Hirogeyou!
titleEnglish: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 3 Let's spread books through the duchy!
titleNative: 本好きの下剋上~司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません~ 第三部 「領地に本を広げよう!」
synonyms: Honzuki no Gekokujou ~Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen~ Dai 3-bu 「Ryouchi ni Hon o Hirogeyou!」
synopsis: Manga adaptation of Part 3 of Honzuki no Gekokujou . To protect those she cares about from danger, Myne abandons the life she knows to become Rozemyne, the archduke’s mana-rich adopted daughter. But her passion for books hasn’t changed, nor does she hesitate to charge into another strange new world. In this biblio-fantasy by bookworms, for bookworms, the detailed setting continues to expand—and so too does the book-making industry! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: The Babe at My Back Has Her Eye on Me. I'm Done For.
titleRomaji: Ushiro no Seki no Gal ni Sukarete Shimatta.: Mou Ore wa Damekamoshirenai.
titleEnglish: The Babe at My Back Has Her Eye on Me. I'm Done For.
titleNative: うしろの席のぎゃるに好かれてしまった。　もう俺はダメかもしれない。
synonyms: The Gal Sitting Behind Me Likes Me.: Maybe I'm Screwed Already.
The gal is sitting behind me, and loves me.
synopsis: A high-school boy Sandai, who liked to spend his time alone, accidentally helped the most beautiful girl in his class, Shino, when she fell into a ditch near his home. He let her use shower at his home, and lend her some clothes, although he had never talked with her before. From that day, she started to act like his friend. In fact, she seems to like him...but that can't be! She's the most popular babe in his high school! But what he didn't know was, Shino had never went out with a guy. She was not very good with guys, and Sandai was the first guy she could talk naturally with. As they spend time together, Sandai can't help himself to have special feelings for Shino. A story of a boy whose life was completely changed by a cute babe! (Source: KADOKAWA Global)

title: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)
titleRomaji: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)
titleNative: 男女の友情は成立する？（いや、しないっ!!）
synopsis: Himari Inuzuka, a cheerful girl who's never been in love, and Yuu Natsume, a flower-loving boy, became friends by chance. Two years later, the two are still best friends. But when Yuu is reunited with his former crush, the relationship between Himari and Yuu began to change......? (Source: Dengeki Daioh, translated)
